3115420.name: My Summer Cottage
3115420.description:
After losing your job, you leave the city behind and move to a remote cottage. Instead of continuing the life of mundane office work, you take odd jobs to get by—while frequently getting drunk (and driving), fishing, taking saunas, and embracing whatever chaos life throws your way.

Features

  • A full-fledged story mode that brings you to the town of Mökkilä, meet eccentric characters and dive headfirst into the chaos.

  • Up to four-player multiplayer co-op, letting you explore and experience the world of My Summer Cottage together!

  • Fully customize your character and cottage with a vast selection of clothing and furniture items.

  • Enjoy side activities like fishing, hunting, farming, drinking, and plenty more to discover!

  • Level up your character in a wide range of skills, giving you new perks and abilities.

  • Complete your collection log by finding and gathering a variety of unique items, bugs, and more.

  • Experience a multitude of side quests and events as you stumble your way through the world.
3115420.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
